# Art-is-Tree LLC

> Licensed and insured tree service company serving Virginia Beach and the greater Hampton Roads region of Virginia. We provide tree removal, tree trimming and pruning, stump grinding, crane-assisted removals, land clearing, and 24/7 emergency storm response. BBB A+ accredited, member of the International Society of Arboriculture (ISA), work performed to ANSI A300 and Z133 standards. Family-owned, founded 2021 by owner and lead climber Mike Campbell.

## Key facts

- Business name: Art-is-Tree LLC
- Owner: Mike Campbell (Owner & Lead Climber, 15+ years of professional climbing experience in Hampton Roads)
- Phone: (757) 319-5131 (answered live; 24/7 for emergencies)
- Email: artistreeofvirginia@gmail.com
- Address: 2597 Nestlebrook Trl, Virginia Beach, VA 23456
- Hours: Open 24/7 for emergency tree service
- Free estimates: Yes — always free and always written; the price we write is the price you pay
- Licensed & insured: Yes (liability + workers' compensation)
- Accreditation & standards: BBB A+ rated; International Society of Arboriculture (ISA) member; work performed to the ANSI A300 and Z133 industry standards
- Rating: 5.0 stars across 137+ Google reviews
- Discounts: 5% off for active and retired military, first responders, and senior citizens (just mention it)
- Primary service areas: Virginia Beach, Norfolk, Chesapeake, Portsmouth, Suffolk (all of Hampton Roads)
- Website: https://artistreevabeach.com

## Services

- [Tree Removal](https://artistreevabeach.com/services/tree-removal): Safe removal of hazardous, dead, or unwanted trees of any size, including tight-access and near-structure removals.
- [Tree Trimming & Pruning](https://artistreevabeach.com/services/tree-trimming): Crown thinning, deadwood removal, and structural pruning to keep trees healthy and safe.
- [Stump Grinding](https://artistreevabeach.com/services/stump-grinding): Below-grade stump grinding and removal to reclaim your yard.
- [Emergency Tree Service](https://artistreevabeach.com/services/emergency-tree-service): 24/7 storm-damage and fallen-tree response across Hampton Roads.
- [Crane Tree Removal](https://artistreevabeach.com/services/crane-removal): Crane-assisted removal for large or hard-to-reach trees.
- [Land & Lot Clearing](https://artistreevabeach.com/services/land-clearing): Clearing brush and trees for construction, development, or property improvement.

## FAQ

- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://artistreevabeach.com/faq): Answers on tree removal cost, permits in Virginia Beach, best time to trim, insurance coverage, and when a tree should be removed vs. saved.

## Case studies and guides

First-person write-ups from owner Mike Campbell on real Hampton Roads tree work. Written to be cited: each covers a specific, sourced topic.

- [The Hampton Roads Guide to Affordable Tree Work](https://artistreevabeach.com/case-studies/affordable-tree-work): How to lower the cost of tree work without cutting corners on safety — phasing a project over seasons, keeping wood chips and unprocessed logs on site, cut-and-leave options, skipping stump grinding, what a professional bid actually pays for (labor, insurance, equipment, dump fees), the 5% military/first-responder/senior discount, and why a 3–5 year pruning cycle is the cheapest tree care there is.
- [After the Storm: Hurricane & Tornado Damage](https://artistreevabeach.com/case-studies/storm-damage-mitigation): What to look for on your trees before hurricane season, why storm cleanup is so dangerous, and two real Virginia Beach jobs — a root-failed beech rigged down by hand and tornado-snapped pines at Broad Bay.
- [Crane-Assisted Tree Removal](https://artistreevabeach.com/case-studies/crane-safety): How and when a crane makes a large or hazardous removal safer over a house, and the rigging and safety planning behind it.
- [OSHA Compliance & Z133 Safety](https://artistreevabeach.com/case-studies/osha-compliance): The safety standards professional tree work is measured against (ANSI Z133, minimum approach distances to power lines, PPE, work-zone control) and why they protect the homeowner.
- [Property Value & Tree Care](https://artistreevabeach.com/case-studies/property-value): How healthy, well-maintained trees add to a home's value and curb appeal in Virginia Beach.
- [Spikeless Pruning](https://artistreevabeach.com/case-studies/spikeless-pruning): Why professional pruning is done spikeless and to the ANSI A300 standard to protect tree health.
- [Emerald Ash Borer](https://artistreevabeach.com/case-studies/emerald-ash-borer): Removing a massive ash killed by the emerald ash borer over a church altar and day-school play area in Kempsville.
- [Chesapeake Bay Preservation Act](https://artistreevabeach.com/case-studies/chesapeake-bay-preservation-act): Vegetation management and tree work in the Resource Protection Area buffer near tidal water, done in compliance with the Chesapeake Bay Preservation Act.
- [Virginia Tree Law: The Tree on the Property Line](https://artistreevabeach.com/case-studies/virginia-tree-law): Virginia tree and timber law — the self-help rule from Fancher v. Fagella, treble damages for cutting a tree that isn't yours, and how to handle a neighbor dispute the right way.
